_comment: SECRETS TEMPLATE — fill in values from your own sources, never commit this file
_docs: See tools/vault-agent/README.md for where to find each value

repository_secrets._description: Set in GitHub → Repo → Settings → Secrets → Actions. Available to ALL environments in this repo. Used by GitHub Actions workflows.

GH_PAT_ADMIN.source: github.com/settings/tokens → Generate new token (classic) → check: repo, workflow, admin:org
GH_PAT_ADMIN.purpose: Lets GitHub Actions bypass branch protection and auto-merge claude/* branches to main

VERCEL_TOKEN.purpose: Authenticates the deploy agent with Vercel API

VERCEL_ORG_ID.source: Vercel → Settings → General → Team ID (starts with team_)
VERCEL_ORG_ID.purpose: Scopes Vercel API calls to your team

VERCEL_PROJECT_ID.source: Vercel → Project → Settings → General → Project ID (starts with prj_)
VERCEL_PROJECT_ID.purpose: Targets the correct Vercel project for deployment

environment_secrets._description: Set in GitHub → Repo → Settings → Environments → (production/preview/development). Scoped to a specific deployment environment. Override repository secrets for that environment only.

NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID.source: emailjs.com → Email Services → your service → Service ID
NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID.purpose: EmailJS service for contact form (client-side, safe to expose)

NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID.source: emailjs.com → Email Templates → your template → Template ID
NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID.purpose: EmailJS template ID for contact form

NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY.source: emailjs.com → Account → API Keys → Public Key
NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY.purpose: EmailJS public key (client-side only, not a sensitive secret)

NEXT_PUBLIC_EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID.source: Same as production or use a test service

local_dev_only._description: Goes in your local .env file ONLY — never pushed to git, never added to GitHub

pauli_repos._description: Same secrets apply to all 4 Pauli repos — set at org level to share across all repos
